data.summary: Rewriting email — trimming to 2 sentences while keeping key context.

fields.label: Body
fields.value:
Hi Rachel, just checking in on order ORD-LATEST and your open balance of $18,200 — let me know if there's anything I can help with.

Best, Heman

closingText.text: Trimmed to 2 sentences — same key info, less reading time. Want to adjust the tone or copy this to send?
